meaning: n.保险业者,承诺支付者,保险商
examples: If the market will not buy the shares, the underwriter buys them.
the name of the underwriter and related agreements.
Depending on whether an operation is invoked by the customer or by the underwriter, the returned behavior may be quite different.
The lack of a guarantee program also makes the job of the underwriter more difficult.
Note that Morgan Stanley was the lead underwriter on the Millennial IPO last March.
